title: BetterThanPVP
description: Enhance your PvP skills with this lightweight client-side modpack! Packed with mods that boost performance and improve PVP in all ways possible.
body:
# Minecraft Better Than PVP
**This client-side-only modpack enhances your PvP skills by optimizing performance and reworking some MC mechanics.**

![BTP logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dd6c1553b302d860d7b4c05052d0f19ecc262b81_0.webp)

## Features:  
- Stable Performance.
- Non-intrusive, legit gameplay improvements to help you excel in PvP.
- Utilities.
- Shaders(not recommended but if you really wanna have it)

**Why Download?**  
Whether you're looking to outplay your opponents or simply enhance your gameplay without compromising.

## Disclaimer/Creator Note:

I am not responsible for any bans, kicks, or server-related issues arising from the use of these mods. Always ensure that the servers you join allow **ALL** client-side mods. 

### Use responsibly!
